candidate_definitions.text: A DNN inference latency prediction toolkit for accurately modeling and predicting the latency on diverse edge devices.

**nn-Meter** is a novel and efficient system to accurately predict the inference latency of DNN models on diverse edge devices. The key idea is dividing a whole model inference into kernels, i.e., the execution units of fused operators on a device, and conduct kernel-level predi…
